sources.name: Michigan DNR MiBFF (item 3eaf9804bf6f4bafb8e03aea660c9fce) + Shore Fishing viewer
sources.notes: Hand-curated from portal patterns + public park maps for 4 high-confidence shore sites. Full automation later.

sources.name: City of Grand Rapids GRData + Kent County GIS

coverage_notes: PR 1 sample only — 4 verified public shore/bank/pier sites (Fish Ladder, Johnson/Millennium, Richmond Pier, Reeds Lake). Full 40-mile classified dataset in later PRs. All features have machine + human citations.
known_limitations: Sample is tiny and hand-curated (no full spatial classification run yet)
Private parcel exclusion / 30m hydro buffer heuristics stubbed for these known sites
No water_bodies layer in PR1 sample
